name: Card Grid
description: Responsive grid container for equal-weight card items.

cols.description: Number of columns on desktop (1 on mobile)

default.description: Grid items (cards, stat cards, info cards, etc.)

decision_rule: Use for displaying multiple equal-weight items in a grid. Use cols=2 for paired items, cols=3 for dashboards, cols=4 for compact grids.

filament_equivalent.note: In Filament forms, use Grid with columns() for multi-column layouts
